title: helianthemum sanguineum
intro: Helianthemum sanguineum, also known as Rockrose or Scarlet Rockrose, is a flowering plant species within the Cistaceae family. It is known for its bright red flowers, which bloom from June to September, and its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to promote tissue repair and reduce inflammation. Helianthemum sanguineum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
